metadata.description: Ask a video a question and /watch fetches relevant evidence. An initial one-video, three-question benchmark measured 60-79% fewer estimated reader tokens with tied-or-better blind judging; broader testing is in progress. Fork of Brad Bonanno's claude-video.

plugins.name: watch
plugins.description: Watch a video (URL or local path). Question-aware evidence retrieval (chapter roll-up, numeric guard, cue frames) with an automatic compatibility fallback on failure.
